capabilities.name: _Consumer
capabilities.description: Minimal protocol for consumers managed by ConsumerLoopManager.

capabilities.name: _Service
capabilities.description: Minimal protocol for the outbox relay target.

capabilities.name: ConsumerLoopManager
capabilities.description: Manages durable consumer daemon threads for a single workspace.

methods.name: start
methods.doc: Start CE, Director, QA consumer threads and the outbox relay.

methods.name: stop
methods.doc: Signal all consumers to stop and join their threads.

methods.name: status
methods.doc: Return running state per consumer role and outbox relay.

methods.name: _run_consumer
methods.doc: Thread target wrapping consumer.run() with exception isolation.

methods.name: _run_outbox_relay
methods.doc: Thread target for periodic outbox relay.

methods.name: _record_consumer_metrics
methods.doc: Record consumer poll metrics via TaskMarketMetrics.

methods.name: _default_consumer_types
methods.doc: Lazy-import default consumer classes.

capabilities.name: DLQManager
capabilities.description: Manages dead-lettered tasks and their lifecycle.

methods.name: move_to_dead_letter
methods.doc: Move a work item into the dead-letter state.

methods.name: load_dlq_items
methods.doc: Load dead-letter entries for a workspace.

methods.name: replay_item
methods.doc: Replay a dead-lettered item back into the active queue.

methods.name: get_dlq_stats
methods.doc: Return aggregated DLQ statistics for a workspace.

capabilities.name: TaskMarketError
capabilities.description: Raised when ``runtime.task_market`` contract processing fails.

capabilities.name: FSMTransitionError
capabilities.description: Raised when an illegal state transition is attempted.

capabilities.name: LeaseAcquisitionError
capabilities.description: Raised when a lease cannot be acquired (already held by another worker).

capabilities.name: StaleLeaseTokenError
capabilities.description: Raised when a lease token is stale or does not match the current holder.

capabilities.name: TaskNotClaimableError
capabilities.description: Raised when a task cannot be claimed (e.g., visibility timeout not yet expired).

capabilities.name: RetryExhaustedError
capabilities.description: Raised when a task has exhausted its retry attempts.

capabilities.name: TaskNotFoundError
capabilities.description: Raised when a task cannot be found in the store.

capabilities.name: TaskStageFSM
capabilities.description: Canonical FSM for task market stage transitions.

methods.name: validate_transition
methods.doc: Validate that a state transition is legal.

methods.name: can_transition
methods.doc: Return True if the transition is allowed, False otherwise.

methods.name: get_in_progress_status
methods.doc: Return the in-progress status label for a queue stage.

methods.name: get_queue_stage_for_status
methods.doc: Return the canonical queue stage for an in-progress status.

methods.name: is_terminal
methods.doc: Return True if the status is terminal.

methods.name: is_queue_stage
methods.doc: Return True if the stage is a queue stage.

methods.name: is_in_progress
methods.doc: Return True if the status is in-progress.

methods.name: _is_allowed
methods.doc: Check if a transition is allowed under the FSM rules.

capabilities.name: HumanReviewManager
capabilities.description: Manages WAITING_HUMAN tasks and human-in-the-loop resolution.

methods.name: create_review_request
methods.doc: Mark a task as WAITING_HUMAN and create a review request.

methods.name: resolve_review
methods.doc: Resolve a waiting human review.

methods.name: escalate_to_tri_council
methods.doc: Escalate a task to the Tri-Council review path.

methods.name: advance_escalation_role
methods.doc: Advance pending review to next Tri-Council role.

methods.name: sweep_escalation_timeouts
methods.doc: Auto-escalate reviews whose escalation_deadline has passed.

methods.name: _verify_resolve_authority
methods.doc: Verify that the resolver has authority to resolve this review.

methods.name: load_pending_reviews
methods.doc: Return all unresolved human-review requests for a workspace.

methods.name: _save_review_request
methods.doc: Upsert a review request through the configured task-market store.

capabilities.name: _read_escalation_timeout
capabilities.description: Read escalation timeout from env, default 3600s (1 hour).

capabilities.name: _compute_escalation_deadline
capabilities.description: Compute the escalation deadline as an ISO timestamp.

capabilities.name: get_next_escalation_role
capabilities.description: Return the next role in the Tri-Council escalation chain, or None.

capabilities.name: LeaseManager
capabilities.description: Manages lease lifecycle for task market work items.

methods.name: grant_lease
methods.doc: Atomically grant a lease on ``item``.

methods.name: renew_lease
methods.doc: Renew an existing lease.

methods.name: validate_token
methods.doc: Validate that ``lease_token`` matches the current holder and is not expired.

methods.name: is_lease_expired
methods.doc: Return True if the lease has expired (or was never held).

methods.name: clear_lease
methods.doc: Clear all lease fields on an item.

methods.name: is_claimable
methods.doc: Return True if the item can be claimed at the given epoch.

capabilities.name: TaskMarketMetrics
capabilities.description: Thread-safe business metrics for ``runtime.task_market``.

methods.name: record_operation
methods.doc: Record an operation invocation with duration.

methods.name: record_outbox_relay
methods.doc: Record outbox relay batch results.

methods.name: set_queue_depth
methods.doc: Set the current queue depth for a stage.

methods.name: record_consumer_poll
methods.doc: Record a consumer poll cycle.

methods.name: get_prometheus_metrics
methods.doc: Return all task_market metrics in Prometheus text exposition format.

methods.name: reset
methods.doc: Reset all metrics for test isolation.

methods.name: time_operation
methods.doc: Context manager / decorator helper that times an operation.

capabilities.name: _OperationTimer
capabilities.description: Context manager for timing a task_market operation.

capabilities.name: get_task_market_metrics
capabilities.description: Return the global TaskMarketMetrics singleton.

capabilities.name: reset_task_market_metrics_for_testing
capabilities.description: Create a fresh singleton for test isolation.

methods.name: is_claimable
methods.doc: Return True if this task can be claimed at the given stage/epoch.

capabilities.name: TaskReconciliationLoop
capabilities.description: Periodic reconciliation loop.

capabilities.name: SagaCompensator
capabilities.description: Task-level compensation state machine stored in task metadata.

capabilities.name: TaskMarketService
capabilities.description: Task market service with lease-aware stage transitions.

methods.name: _get_store
methods.doc: Return the appropriate store backend (lazy).

methods.name: reconcile_parent_statuses
methods.doc: Reconcile parent task status with current child aggregate state.

methods.name: start_consumer_loops
methods.doc: Start durable consumer daemon threads for a workspace.

methods.name: stop_consumer_loops
methods.doc: Stop durable consumer daemon threads for a workspace.

methods.name: stop_all_consumer_loops
methods.doc: Stop all running consumer loop managers. Returns count stopped.

methods.name: query_consumer_loop_status
methods.doc: Return consumer loop status for a workspace.

methods.name: sweep_escalation_timeouts
methods.doc: Auto-escalate HITL reviews whose escalation_deadline has passed.

methods.name: requeue_drifted_items
methods.doc: Detect revision drift and auto-requeue drifted items to pending_design.

methods.name: detect_revision_drift
methods.doc: Detect work items whose plan_revision_id lags behind the latest revision.

methods.name: analyze_change_order_impact
methods.doc: Preview the impact of a change order without mutating any state.

methods.name: validate_dependency_dag
methods.doc: Validate the depends_on graph for cycles and orphan references.

methods.name: _observe
methods.doc: Record operation metrics, structured logging, and OTel span.

methods.name: _classify_impact
methods.doc: Classify the impact of a change order on a task based on its current status (read-only).

methods.name: _maybe_emit_webhook
methods.doc: Emit a webhook outbox record if callback_url is provided.

methods.name: _build_outbox_record
methods.doc: Build an outbox record for later atomic write or direct append.

methods.name: _emit_fact
methods.doc: Write an outbox record for async fact_stream delivery via relay.

capabilities.name: TaskMarketJSONStore

methods.name: begin
methods.doc: No-op for JSON backend (no transaction support).

methods.name: commit
methods.doc: No-op for JSON backend.

methods.name: rollback
methods.doc: No-op for JSON backend.

methods.name: save_items_and_outbox_atomic
methods.doc: Best-effort atomic write for JSON backend (falls back to sequential writes).

capabilities.name: get_store
capabilities.description: Return the appropriate store backend.

capabilities.name: TaskMarketSQLiteStore
capabilities.description: SQLite WAL implementation of the task market store.

methods.name: _get_conn
methods.doc: Return a cached connection for this workspace (thread-safe).

methods.name: _open_conn
methods.doc: Open a new SQLite connection with WAL pragmas.

methods.name: _init_db
methods.doc: Create tables if they don't exist.

methods.name: load_items
methods.doc: Load all work items for this workspace.

methods.name: upsert_item
methods.doc: Insert or update a work item (uses INSERT OR REPLACE).

methods.name: save_items
methods.doc: Batch upsert (delegates to individual upsert for simplicity).

methods.name: append_transition
methods.doc: Record a state transition in the audit log.

methods.name: load_transitions
methods.doc: Load all transitions for a task, ordered by version asc.

methods.name: append_dead_letter
methods.doc: Append a dead-letter entry (uses INSERT OR REPLACE on task_id).

methods.name: load_dead_letters
methods.doc: Load the most recent ``limit`` dead-letter entries.

methods.name: upsert_human_review_request
methods.doc: Insert or update a human review request.

methods.name: load_human_review_requests
methods.doc: Load unresolved human review requests.

methods.name: upsert_plan_revision
methods.doc: Insert or update a plan revision record.

methods.name: load_plan_revisions
methods.doc: Load plan revisions for a workspace (optionally by plan_id).

methods.name: append_change_order
methods.doc: Append a change-order entry.

methods.name: load_change_orders
methods.doc: Load change-order entries for a workspace (optionally by plan_id).

methods.name: begin
methods.doc: Begin an explicit transaction (BEGIN IMMEDIATE).

methods.name: commit
methods.doc: Commit the current explicit transaction.

methods.name: rollback
methods.doc: Roll back the current explicit transaction.

methods.name: save_items_and_outbox_atomic
methods.doc: Atomically persist items, transitions, and outbox messages in one transaction.

methods.name: acquire_advisory_lock
methods.doc: Try to acquire a simple advisory lock.

capabilities.name: _row_to_dict
